Package org.eventb.keyboard.tests.core

Class Text2EventBMathExpressionTestCase

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.keyboard.core.tests.AbstractText2EventBMathTestCase
org.eventb.keyboard.tests.core.Text2EventBMathExpressionTestCase
Direct Known Subclasses:
EventBKeyboardExpressionTestCase
public class Text2EventBMathExpressionTestCase extends AbstractText2EventBMathTestCase
This class contains some expression test cases for Text2EventBMath translator.

This tests the symbol translation on some large expressions taken from Prof. Jean-Raymond Abrial's Marriage and SHWT developments.
